title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat's Project Lightwell is a $5 billion initiative using AI-augmented engineers to strengthen open source security. SymJack is a new attack that manipulates AI coding agents into compromising themselves. LayerX's 2026 report reveals uneven AI adoption across organizations, concentrating power in few users while fragmenting through software supply chains.
